title: nonatelia maingayi
intro: Nonatelia maingayi is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Menispermaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurveda, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Nonatelia maingayi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of Nonatelia maingayi can be made into decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
